concerns.text: T015 [P] marked parallel-safe but works on same file (01_data_acquisition.py) as T014. Tasks modifying the same file cannot run in parallel. Either remove [P] tag or split into separate files.
T025 and T026 both marked [P] but work on same file (03_model_training.py). Cannot execute in parallel. Remove [P] from one or both, or split into separate modules.

T020 [US1] implements 'stratified balancing before metric calculation' but metric calculation belongs to US2 (fairness metrics). This is a cross-story dependency placed in wrong user story. Move to US2 or US3.

T006 creates utils/metrics.py with fairness metric formulas; T029 [US2] also documents formulas in utils/metrics.py. This is either redundant or T029 should reference T006's output. Clarify ownership.

T008 creates utils/validators.py for checksum verification; T015 [US1] also implements SHA-256 checksum verification in 01_data_acquisition.py. Either T015 should call T008's validators or remove redundancy.

Inconsistent [P] tagging within same files: T036 [P] but T037-T039 not; T040 [P] but T041-T044 not; T045 [P] but T046-T048 not; T049 [P] but T050-T052 not. All tasks in same file should have consistent [P] status.

Phase 6 (Associational Framing) is a cross-cutting concern that should be applied throughout all phases, not isolated as a separate phase. Consider distributing T053-T056 across US1-US3 implementation tasks.
